name: ENTIA Entity Verification
description: 5,220,360 verified business entities across 34 countries (exact live count from get_platform_stats). Deep Spain coverage: BORME 40.3M mercantile acts, REPS healthcare, IBEX 35, plus VIES, GLEIF, Wikidata, Companies House, INSEE/Sirene. Real-time entity lookup, trust scoring, KYB-ready for AI agents. Free tier: 100 req/day.

env.name: ENTIA_API_KEY
env.description: Optional API key (entia_live_...) for paid tiers. Free tier (100 req/day) needs no key. Get yours at https://entia.systems/mcp-setup

tools.name: entity_lookup
tools.description: Verify identity of any business by name, CIF/NIF, EU VAT or LEI. Cross-checks BORME, VIES, GLEIF.

tools.name: search_entities
tools.description: Search verified entities across 34 countries by name, keyword, country, or sector.

tools.name: verify_vat
tools.description: Real-time EU VAT validation via VIES (27 member states).

tools.name: zone_profile
tools.description: Spanish socioeconomic profile by postal code (INE/SEPE/AEAT): income, employment, business density.

tools.name: ai_ready_profile
tools.description: Full AI-ready JSON-LD profile for an entity (4-node @graph).

tools.name: get_competitors
tools.description: Real competitors in the same sector and geography.

tools.name: get_showcase
tools.description: Curated IBEX35 + EU showcase entities. Free, does not consume quota.

tools.name: professional_lookup
tools.description: Verify professional registrations across 24 Spanish health/legal/psychology verticals. Requires DPA (GDPR Art. 28).

tools.name: get_full_dossier
tools.description: Aggregator: 90+ fields about an entity in one call (combines 4 ENTIA sources).

tools.name: get_platform_stats
tools.description: Live platform stats: entities, countries, sources.

tools.name: run_risk_audit
tools.description: AI-readiness + digital risk audit for any domain.

tools.name: get_entia_home
tools.description: Full Schema.org JSON-LD @graph for an entity (Entia Home).

tools.name: lookup_by_domain
tools.description: Look up a business entity by its website domain. Roadmap: coming in v1.2.
